project_context: ExoPlayer overlay & control dock - 10x2 variants for Android TV

theme_and_archetype.description: Cinematic, premium, Apple TV+ meets cyberpunk, dark glass, generous breathing room.

typography.heading: Manrope or Outfit (sans-serif, cinematic, DO NOT USE INTER)
typography.monospace: JetBrains Mono or Roboto Mono (for eyebrows, chips, timecodes)

effects.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1) or rgba(93,200,255,0.3) for cyberpunk variants
effects.corners: 18px to 22px (rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl) for Apple TV style, sharp (rounded-none) for cyberpunk

movies_data.title: Pacific Rim
movies_data.synopsis: As a war between humankind and monstrous sea creatures wages on, a former pilot and a trainee are paired up to drive a seemingly obsolete special weapon in a desperate effort to save the world from the apocalypse.

movies_data.title: Blade Runner 2049
movies_data.synopsis: Young Blade Runner K's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former Blade Runner Rick Deckard, who's been missing for thirty years.

movies_data.title: The Batman
movies_data.synopsis: When a sadistic serial killer begins murdering key political figures in Gotham, Batman is forced to investigate the city's hidden corruption and question his family's involvement.

movies_data.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
movies_data.synopsis: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners, a psychotic worshiper, and a drifter named Max.

movies_data.title: Oppenheimer
movies_data.synopsis: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

movies_data.title: Top Gun: Maverick
movies_data.synopsis: After thirty years, Maverick is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator, but must confront ghosts of his past when he leads TOP GUN's elite graduates on a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

movies_data.title: Inception
movies_data.synopsis: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.

movies_data.title: Interstellar
movies_data.synopsis: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival as Earth's resources are slowly depleted.

movies_data.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
movies_data.synopsis: John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe.

movies_data.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
movies_data.synopsis: Jake Sully lives with his newfound family formed on the extrasolar moon Pandora. Once a familiar threat returns to finish what was previously started, Jake must work with Neytiri and the army of the Na'vi race to protect their home.

overlay_variants.name: Left-Fade Classic
overlay_variants.layout: Left-aligned, logo top-left, chips in row below title

overlay_variants.name: Right-Fade Cyberpunk
overlay_variants.layout: Right-aligned, huge logo replaces standard title, monospace typography

overlay_variants.name: Vignette Center
overlay_variants.layout: Centered layout, logo top-center, chips stacked below synopsis

overlay_variants.name: Top-Fade Glassmorphism
overlay_variants.layout: Top-heavy layout, text spans top edge, scrubber fixed to very bottom

overlay_variants.name: Bottom-Anchored Block
overlay_variants.layout: Horizontal flow inside bottom block, logo right-aligned above block

overlay_variants.name: Diagonal Split
overlay_variants.layout: Angled layout positioning, metallic text gradient on title

overlay_variants.name: Apple TV Style
overlay_variants.layout: Generous padding, small refined typography, logo subtle in corner

overlay_variants.name: Grid Bento Panel
overlay_variants.fade: Left 40% filled with translucent bento grid blocks
overlay_variants.layout: Structured boxes for logo, synopsis, chips

overlay_variants.name: Full Screen Frosted
overlay_variants.layout: Crisp white/cyan text over blurred background, logo center-left

overlay_variants.name: Cinematic Borderless
overlay_variants.fade: No fade, rely on heavy text shadows
overlay_variants.layout: Typography only. Logo bottom-left, synopsis top-left

control_variants.name: The Classic TV Bar
control_variants.shape: Full-width dark gradient bar at bottom
control_variants.scrubber: Full width directly on top of bar

control_variants.name: Floating Pill Glass
control_variants.shape: Rounded-full pill floating 40px from bottom, backdrop-blur-xl

control_variants.name: Apple TV Blur
control_variants.scrubber: Thin minimal line at very bottom

control_variants.name: Corner Cluster
control_variants.shape: Floating bento box in bottom-right corner
control_variants.scrubber: Vertical on left edge of the bento box

control_variants.name: Cyberpunk Neon Deck
control_variants.shape: Sharp corners (rounded-none), cyan borders, neon glow
control_variants.scrubber: Monospace timecodes glowing above an angular line

control_variants.name: Radial Arc
control_variants.shape: Controls arranged in a slight upward curve
control_variants.scrubber: Arches over the controls (using CSS transform or positioning)

control_variants.name: MacOS Dock
control_variants.shape: Glass background, icons scale on hover/focus
control_variants.layout: Separators between playback, audio, and settings

control_variants.name: Minimalist Hover
control_variants.layout: Only Play/Pause visible, others expand horizontally on focus

critical_rules: Create exactly 22 files. The UI must be constructed using native HTML and Tailwind CSS via CDN. Do not create React components.
Ensure 1920x1080 scaling using CSS or aspect-video wrappers.
Embed standard FontAwesome or Heroicons SVG paths directly in the HTML for playback controls.
All interactive elements (buttons, scrubbers) MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='play-button', data-testid='settings-button').
DO NOT use Inter font. Use Manrope or Outfit from Google Fonts.

For TMDB movie logos: Use stylized HTML/CSS typography to emulate the transparent PNG logos (since exact TMDB API paths are unavailable without an API key). For example, use `<h1 class="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r...">` layered above the title.
MOCKED INTEGRATION: The image URLs provided are high-quality Unsplash fallbacks. Use these directly in the background/img tags to ensure the mockups render beautifully without broken links.
Ensure every variant is visually DISTINCT as per the specs, not just a color swap.
